body.title: min_tier mode switch — reading bootstrap via TWM
body.result: Superseded by T-reading-bootstrap-mode (L-size sprint). D268 implemented there — full path B with TWM category, gateway flag, tools, habit, and tests.
body.description: Add min_tier check to inference_gateway tier routing; seed PROC_READING_BOOTSTRAP habit that pushes MODE|reading_bootstrap|min_tier=tier.4 to TWM with TTL. Enables controlled tier override for architecture doc reads without external env vars.
